structured_output.summary: The revised plan resolves the prior consultation's main gaps: failed-state display (「再処理失敗」), voiceprint overlay readyState pre-check plus 10s timeout, and silent list refresh for status follow-up. It faithfully captures intent and the verification contract covers all touched surfaces. Remaining SHOULD_FIX items are small specification gaps: the detail page's live 処理中→完了 transition and an anti-downgrade guard for the optimistic update are implied but not stated, and the silent-polling stop/cleanup conditions should be explicit. No MUST_FIX; implementable once these are pinned down in a sentence or two each.

findings.title: Detail page live status follow-up not explicitly specified
findings.evidence: plan.md item 6 specifies silent refresh for the 一覧 only, while 完了条件 requires 詳細 to also show 「完了」/「再処理失敗」 after the job ends; `meetings-store.ts` and `meetings/[id]/page.tsx` are target files but the detail-side refresh path is unstated.
findings.recommendation: State whether the detail view subscribes to the same silently-refreshed store or polls independently while status is queued/running, and add a test asserting the detail badge transitions without a manual reload.

findings.title: Optimistic update lacks an anti-downgrade guard
findings.evidence: plan.md item 5 optimistically sets 「処理中」 then re-syncs with API meeting data; a resync response racing the queued commit could briefly revert the badge to 「完了」 (carried over unaddressed from the prior review's F4).
findings.recommendation: Use the reprocess POST response as the resync source or guard the resync so it never downgrades queued/running to completed within the same interaction.

findings.title: Silent polling stop/cleanup conditions implied but not testable
findings.evidence: plan.md item 6 says silent updates run 「処理中の会議がある間」 but does not specify interval, unmount cleanup, or error backoff.
findings.recommendation: Specify the polling interval, that timers clear on unmount and when no meeting is queued/running, and cover the stop condition in test_meeting_status_display or test_transcript_reprocess_ui.

findings.title: Verification contract depends on another task's worktree venv
findings.evidence: verification-contract.md invokes python from `.pipeline/worktrees/recording-range-streaming/checkout/.venv`, coupling this task's verification to a sibling worktree's environment surviving.
findings.recommendation: Acceptable if that venv is the pipeline's shared interpreter, but prefer a task-local or repo-level venv path to avoid breakage when the sibling worktree is cleaned up.

findings.title: 「再処理失敗」 badge semantics vs. existing transcript
findings.evidence: plan.md item 4 maps failed to 「再処理失敗」 on the meeting's common status display, but a failed reprocess usually leaves the prior completed transcript intact and viewable.
findings.recommendation: Confirm the failed badge does not imply the meeting itself is unusable (e.g., keep transcript accessible and consider a retry affordance), and reflect the chosen behavior in the status display test.

local_verification: Inspect services/dashboard/src/stores/meetings-store.ts to confirm whether detail and list share refreshed state (resolves F1 without plan change if true)
Inspect services/meeting-api/meeting_api/meetings.py reprocess endpoint response body to confirm it returns the committed queued status (supports F2 guard)
cd services/dashboard && npm test && npm run build
